modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to remove an unused email account from Outlook.

full_description_text:  
I want to get rid of an email account in Outlook that I don’t use anymore. It’s just sitting there, and I don’t need access to it at all. Can you help me with this? I’m not sure how to do it myself, and it’s kind of annoying having it there.
short_description: Need to remove an unused email account from Outlook.
description: I want to get rid of an email account in Outlook that I don’t use anymore. It’s just sitting there, and I don’t need access to it at all. Can you help me with this? I’m not sure how to do it myself, and it’s kind of annoying having it there.
